scripts.phpstan: XDEBUG_MODE=off php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpstan analyse app bootstrap database resources routes -l 1
scripts.phpstan-l2: XDEBUG_MODE=off php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpstan analyse app bootstrap database resources routes system tests -l 2

scripts-descriptions.test-logger: This is just a test to see how basic php script activation is working. Just write composer test-logger into the terminal.
scripts-descriptions.migrate: This should start the migration, and create tables in the db. Just write 'composer migrate'.
scripts-descriptions.seed: This should seed the database with some data. Just write 'composer seed'.
scripts-descriptions.phpstan: Run PHPStan level 1 with increased memory and Xdebug disabled to prevent memory-limit crashes.
scripts-descriptions.phpstan-l2: Run PHPStan level 2 with increased memory and Xdebug disabled to prevent parallel worker memory-limit crashes.
